title: CRISPR-Cas12a Biosensor Array for Ultrasensitive Detection of Unamplified DNA with Single-Nucleotide Polymorphic Discrimination

primary_findings.key_achievement: Amplification-free CRISPR-Cas12a gFET array achieves attomolar sensitivity
primary_findings.significance: Enables ultrasensitive DNA detection without target preamplification

platform_advantages.sensitivity_enhancement: gFET platform leverages graphene for ultrasensitivity

detection_capabilities.reliability: Multiple parallel sensors reduce measurement variance

application_scope.disease_screening: Clinical diagnostics with femtomolar minimum sensitivity

technical_innovation.crispr_mechanism: Multiturn trans-cleavage activity enables continuous signal generation
technical_innovation.graphene_integration: gFET provides electrical transduction of enzymatic activity
